response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with roughly 15 years of full-stack experience, solid TypeScript depth, and directly relevant recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI-specific work spans barely a year; there is no evidence of Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or enterprise customer-facing GenAI delivery. He reads as an excellent generalist software craftsman rather than a staff-level applied-GenAI forward deployed engineer.
strengths: Current hands-on work on MCP code generators and AI-agent/agentic-workflow infrastructure, a listed key technology
15+ years of broad production engineering with strong TypeScript/Node.js, AWS CDK, Kubernetes, and high-throughput systems experience
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing (workshops, conference talks, courses), relevant to customer-facing technical leadership
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions; GenAI experience is roughly one year
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation/observability, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph or CrewAI
No Python listed, and no track record of forward-deployed or enterprise customer-facing AI delivery

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG, vector DB, and LLM evaluation expertise
Relevant MCP/agentic tooling work and strong TypeScript engineering foundation
